steps.title: Recognize that A(b) is a function of the base
steps.content: The function $A(b) = 7b^2$ takes the base length $b$ (in cm) as input and outputs the area (in cm²). The problem directly states that the function $A(b)$ gives the area if the length of its base is $b$ cm.

steps.title: Interpret A(18) = 2,268 to find the base and area
steps.content: When $A(18) = 2,268$, the input is $b = 18$ and the output is 2,268. Since $A(b)$ represents area, this means: base = 18 cm and area = 2,268 cm². That matches choice C — C is correct.
